display.purpose: Hero wordmark only, one use per page.

title.purpose: Tab titles, process-step titles, section labels.

label.purpose: Nav links, kickers, stat labels, form labels — always uppercase, wide-tracked.

accent-script.purpose: The one Playfair Display italic moment per section.

shadows.name: ambient-focus-glow
shadows.purpose: Marks the single most important panel in a view (hero window, sticky process visual).

motion.name: ease-out-power3
motion.purpose: Default GSAP ease for reveals, tab indicator, masked text.

motion.name: ease-magnetic-return
motion.purpose: CTA return-to-rest after magnetic cursor tracking — the one permitted bounce, reserved for this single interaction.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Solid amber CTA, used once per form (Send Enquiry).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #c4922a; color: #0d0b09; padding: 0.8rem 2.5rem; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 400; border: 1px solid #c4922a; border-radius: 0; transition: background 0.25s, color 0.25s, border-color 0.25s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover, .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { background: transparent; color: #c4922a; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Nav/tab CTA with a thin border that fills solid amber on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-block; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.68rem; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #9a9080; border: 1px solid rgba(196,146,42,0.3); padding: 0.45rem 1.2rem; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.25s, color 0.25s, border-color 0.25s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover, .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { background: #c4922a; color: #0d0b09; border-color: #c4922a; }

components.name: Floating-Label Input
components.description: Underline-only text field whose label floats up on focus/fill.
components.css: .ds-field { position: relative; margin-bottom: 2rem; } .ds-input { width: 100%; background: transparent; border: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(237,232,213,0.1); padding: 0.8rem 0 0.6rem; color: #ede8d5; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 300; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.3s; } .ds-input::placeholder { opacity: 0; } .ds-input:focus { border-bottom-color: #c4922a; } .ds-label { position: absolute; top: 0.8rem; left: 0; font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #9a9080; pointer-events: none; transition: all 0.25s ease; } .ds-input:focus ~ .ds-label, .ds-input:not(:placeholder-shown) ~ .ds-label { top: -1rem; font-size: 0.58rem; color: #ede8d5; }

components.name: Stat Cell
components.description: Borderless grid cell for a number + label, no card background, amber wash on hover.
components.css: .ds-stat { padding: 2.5rem 2rem; border-right: 1px solid rgba(237,232,213,0.1); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(237,232,213,0.1); position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .ds-stat::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: #c4922a; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.4s; } .ds-stat:hover::before { opacity: 0.04; } .ds-stat-num { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: clamp(3rem, 5vw, 5rem); line-height: 1; display: block; position: relative; color: #ede8d5; } .ds-stat-label { font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #9a9080; margin-top: 0.5rem; display: block; position: relative; }

components.name: Section Header
components.description: Recurring section title with underline and a numbered pagination tag (e.g. 01/04).
components.css: .ds-section-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline; padding: 1.2rem 3rem 1rem; } .ds-section-label { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 2rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #ede8d5; border-bottom: 2px solid #c4922a; padding-bottom: 0.15rem; display: inline-block; } .ds-section-num { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 1rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: #9a9080; }

components.name: Browser-Window Panel
components.description: Signature 'code renders to preview' chrome — traffic-light dots, fake URL bar, code block, then a miniature rendered preview.
components.html:
manndev.ca
const site = build({ design: 'custom' })
components.css: .ds-window { width: 100%; max-width: 380px; border: 1px solid rgba(196,146,42,0.3); background: #0a0907; box-shadow: 0 0 60px rgba(196,146,42,0.08), 0 0 0 1px rgba(196,146,42,0.06) inset; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .ds-window-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.6rem 0.9rem; background: #111009; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(237,232,213,0.1); } .ds-dot { width: 9px; height: 9px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-window-url { flex: 1; margin-left: 0.5rem; background: rgba(237,232,213,0.05); border: 1px solid rgba(237,232,213,0.08); border-radius: 3px; padding: 0.25rem 0.6rem; font-size: 0.58rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: #9a9080; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; } .ds-window-body { padding: 1.2rem; } .ds-window-code { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.62rem; color: #c4922a; }

narrative.overview:
A desk-lamp glow on dark wood at night: a single craftsman's workspace, not an open-plan agency floor. The system is near-black and warm, lit by one scarce amber accent, set in a typewriter mono body with Bebas Neue doing the shouting and Playfair Display doing the one quiet, italic aside. Everything is flat, ruled, and grid-aligned — the visual equivalent of clean, unbloated code. It explicitly rejects bright SaaS gradients, hero-metric blocks, stock illustration, and anything that signals "built from a template," because the entire site's argument is that it wasn't.

Density is editorial: long rule lines, generous negative space between sections, content organized like a printed brief (numbered sections, "01/04" pagination) rather than stacked cards. Motion is purposeful and restrained — masked text reveals, a sliding tab indicator, a magnetic CTA — never decorative bounce.
keyCharacteristics: Near-black warm ink background, never true #000
One scarce amber accent — restraint is the point, not warmth-everywhere
Bebas Neue for scale and shout, IBM Plex Mono for everything functional, Playfair Display italic for the one editorial aside per section
Flat surfaces, hairline rules, zero border-radius
Soft amber glow (not drop shadow) signals the one important panel per view

rules.name: The Scarcity Rule
rules.body: Amber appears on rules, underlines, hover states, and exactly one CTA per section — never as a fill color across more than a thin strip of any view.

rules.name: The Warm-Neutral Rule
rules.body: No neutral in this system is pure black or pure white. Every ink and paper tone carries the same warm, slightly brown-gold undertone as the amber accent.

rules.name: The One Serif Rule
rules.body: Playfair Display italic appears once per major section, never as body copy and never in more than one weight.

rules.name: The Wide Label Rule
rules.body: Anything in Label role is uppercase with ≥0.18em letter-spacing.

rules.name: The One Glow Rule
rules.body: Only one element on screen may carry the ambient amber glow at a time. It is a spotlight, not ambient lighting.

dos: Do keep amber to hairlines, underlines, one CTA, and one glow per view (The Scarcity Rule).
Do tint every neutral warm — Ink Black (#0d0b09) and Paper Cream (#ede8d5), never #000/#fff.
Do use Bebas Neue only for scale/shout and IBM Plex Mono for everything functional; reserve Playfair italic for one aside per section.
Do keep every corner square (0px radius) — sharp edges are part of the "no templates" argument.
Do show the build, don't just claim it — when documenting process or capability, prefer the code-block → rendered-preview pattern over a bullet list of claims.
Do use wide-tracked (≥0.18em) uppercase mono for all labels, kickers, and nav links.
donts: Don't use bright SaaS gradients, hero-metric blocks, or stock illustration.
Don't add team photos or agency-style process diagrams.
Don't let amber cover more than a thin strip, a button, or a single glow.
Don't add drop shadows or card-lift hovers.
Don't stack more than one Playfair Display moment in the same viewport.
Don't apply the amber glow to more than one panel on screen at once.
